title: Meeting: Among One’s Own’ in the Warsaw Way: the City’s Intangible Cultural Heritage
content:
In early January, Professor Hanna Schreiber, Head of our UNESCO Chair, took part in the debate “‘Among One’s Own’ in the Warsaw Way: the City’s Intangible Cultural Heritage”, organised by the University of Warsaw’s Centre for Research on the Culture of Warsaw.

The discussion explored Warsaw’s intangible cultural heritage in broader national and international contexts, including its identification, safeguarding, promotion, and the challenges of political instrumentalisation.

The debate also featured Katarzyna Kuzko-Zwierz, Head of the Praga Museum, and Dr Artur Jóźwik, Director of the Culture Bureau of the City of Warsaw.

We thank the organisers for the invitation and the audience for their engagement in this important conversation on the city, community, an
creator: admin
sourceTitle: UNESCO Chair on Intangible Cultural Heritage (ICH) in Public and Global Governance
